description_long: This is a dark, rounded ceramic vase with a single curved handle and a wide, flared mouth. The body of the vase is predominantly black with areas of worn, lighter coloration, suggesting age or intentional distressing. One side features a painted depiction of a winged figure, possibly inspired by ancient Greek or Roman motifs, rendered in a pale, contrasting color. The handle is robust and smoothly integrated into the neck and shoulder of the vase. The base is slightly raised and circular, providing stability. The surface finish is matte with visible signs of wear, giving the vase an antique appearance.
description: A dark, rounded ceramic vase with a single handle, flared mouth, and a painted winged figure on one side. The surface is matte and shows signs of age or wear.
description_view_0: The vase is seen from the side, showing the handle and the flared mouth, with some worn patches on the body.
description_view_1: The back view highlights the handle's attachment and the mostly unadorned, dark surface with minor wear.
description_view_2: This angle shows the handle from the opposite side and more of the worn, lighter patches on the vase's body.
description_view_3: The front view displays the painted winged figure motif prominently on the vase's body.
